text:
Things that would have ended ANY other presidency, but barely made the news cycle under Trump:

- Commerce Secretary lied about visiting Epstein's island
- DHS using judge-free subpoenas to unmask anonymous critics
- DNI illegally seized Puerto Rico voting machines
- Convicted sex trafficker offered testimony for clemency
- $71 million in taxpayer golf spending in a single year
- Posted classified jobs data 12 hours early

We've become numb. Don't be.
